hero.sub: Verified rental cars, booked before you land.

how.s1_desc: Filter by type, price, and pickup location. Every listing is document-verified before it goes live. No surprises.
how.s2_desc: Send a booking from anywhere in the world. Vendor confirms within 24 hours. Your car waits — not you.
how.s3_desc: MTN MoMo or Orange Money — no card needed. Funds held in escrow and released only after your trip completes.
how.s4_desc: Your car is confirmed, your vendor is waiting. No scrambling, no uncertainty. Leave a review when you're done.

stats.d3: Vendor responds or your booking auto-cancels.

trust.heading: Verified in every way
trust.c1_body: Every vendor submits RCCM certificate, carte grise, CIMA-compliant insurance, and visite technique before listing a single car.
trust.c2_body: Your money is held securely. Vendors receive payment only after your trip completes without issues. Disputes handled by Karu.
trust.c3_body: Customers review vendors. Vendors review customers. Accountability flows both ways — great service rises to the top.
trust.c4_body: Local habits respected. Every booking comes with verified WhatsApp contact — familiar communication, trusted vendor.
trust.c5_body: Book from London, Paris, or New York. Your car is confirmed and waiting before your flight even lands in Douala.
trust.c6_body: All listed vehicles carry mandatory motor third-party liability insurance under the CIMA Code — the law, enforced.

faq.heading: Frequently asked
faq.q1: Why Karu instead of WhatsApp groups?
faq.a1: WhatsApp groups give you no verification, no payment security, and no recourse if something goes wrong. Karu gives you all three — plus the vendor's documents on file and escrow payments so your money is protected.
faq.a2: MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money are both supported. No card required. Funds are held in escrow by Karu and released to the vendor only after your trip completes without issues.
faq.q3: What if something goes wrong with the car?
faq.a3: All listed vehicles carry mandatory CIMA-compliant motor insurance. For disputes — damage claims, disagreements — Karu mediates and can withhold or adjust vendor payouts based on evidence submitted by both parties.
faq.a4: Vendors submit their RCCM business registration, carte grise, CIMA insurance certificate, and visite technique for every listed vehicle. Documents are reviewed before any listing goes live.
faq.a5: Douala launches first — it's Cameroon's economic capital and busiest arrival point. Yaoundé follows in Phase 1. Expansion across Central and West Africa is planned for Phase 3.
faq.q6: Is Karu free to list on?
faq.a6: Listing is free. Karu takes a 15% commission from vendor payouts per completed booking. Customers pay a small service fee on top of the rental price. No subscriptions, no monthly fees — you only pay when you earn.

waitlist.heading: Get Early Access
waitlist.description: First to register gets priority placement if you're a vendor — and first-mover pricing as a customer.
waitlist.no_spam: No spam · Notified when we launch in your city
waitlist.success_douala: We'll notify you when Karu launches in Douala.
waitlist.success_yaounde: We'll notify you when Karu launches in Yaoundé.
waitlist.success_other: We'll notify you when Karu comes to your city.
waitlist.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
waitlist.count_label: Join {count} others already on the waitlist

footer.tagline: Verified car rentals across Cameroon. Built by Zanix — infrastructure for African commerce.
footer.zanix: A Zanix product · Built for Cameroon

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: When you join the Karu waitlist, we collect your email address, user type (customer or vendor), and city. We also store a hashed (non-reversible) version of your IP address for security purposes only.
privacy.s2_body: We use your email solely to notify you when Karu launches in your city. We do not sell, share, or use your data for advertising. We do not use cookies or tracking pixels.
privacy.s3_body: We use Plausible Analytics — a privacy-first, cookieless analytics tool. No personal data is collected. No consent banner is required.
privacy.s4_body: You may request deletion of your data at any time by emailing hello@getkaru.io. We will remove your record within 72 hours.
privacy.s5_body: Your data is stored securely on Supabase infrastructure in the EU West region. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: By joining the Karu waitlist, you agree to receive a single notification email when Karu launches in your city. You may unsubscribe at any time by replying to any email or contacting us at hello@getkaru.io.
terms.s2_body: Karu is currently in pre-launch. Joining the waitlist does not guarantee access to the platform, a specific launch date, or any pricing. We reserve the right to modify or cancel the service at any time.
terms.s3_body: You agree not to submit false information, abuse the waitlist system, or attempt to interfere with the platform in any way.
terms.s4_body: All content, branding, and design on this site is the property of Karu / Zanix. You may not reproduce or distribute it without written permission.
terms.s5_body: These terms are governed by the laws of Cameroon. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Douala, Cameroon.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We're a small team building something meaningful for Cameroon. Reach out — we read every message.
